    2026

    • June Kuhn, Byuka Makodru, Courtney N. Reed, Adam Schmidt, 2026. Connecting to Ground: A Séance in the Wick Woodlands. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Benedict R. Gaster, Nathan Renney, Courtney N. Reed, Rodrigo Constanzo, Jasmine Butt, Maisie Palmer, Laddy Cadavid Hinojosa, Kathy Hinde, Sarah Angliss, Atau Tanaka, Tom Mitchell, 2026. radical interaction: a podcast of interaction exchange. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Erik Løvaas, Courtney N. Reed, Paul Strohmeier, 2026. Towards Sensory Attenuation as a Measure of Agency Provided by Digital Musical Instruments. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Luiz Ribeiro Fonseca, Thiago Albuquerque, Albery Albuquerque, Courtney N. Reed, 2026. Listening to Amazônia Verde Viva: Transmorphic Intersections of Ecology and Music Technology in the Global South. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Charles Martin, Yichen Wang, Pia van Gelder, Doga Cavdir, Fabio Morreale, Andrew McPherson, Juan Avila, Stefano Fasciani, Courtney N. Reed, 2026. Future NIME Leaders Workshop. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Charalampos Saitis, Fabio Morreale, Landon Morrison, Ashley Noel-Hirst, Rebecca Fiebrink, Joseph Meyer, Courtney N. Reed, 2026. From Tacit to Tokenised: Critical Perspectives on AI Text-to-Audio Interfaces. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Ania Mokrzycka, Luiz Ribeiro Fonseca, Karina Townsend, Vitória Croda, Ines Nolasco, Courtney N. Reed, 2026. The Third Bank of the River Lea: Listening to Waterbodies in East London. Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces in Musical Expression (NIME '26). ✧ [PDF]
    • Courtney N. Reed, Marta Ferreira, Mónica Mendes, Pedro Galvão-Ferreira, Marion Koelle, Alice C Haynes, Fiona Bell, Alexandra Teixeira Riggs, Laia Turmo Vidal, Mathilde Gouin, Vineetha Rallabandi, Karen Anne Cochrane, 2026. In-Situ Seeding: Entangling Place & Technology through Sensory Data Dialogues. Proceedings of the Twentieth International Conference on Tangible, Embedded, and Embodied Interaction (TEI '26). DOI: 10.1145/3731459.3774489 ✧ [PDF]
